description: Fix review issues: XSS in duplicate-detection, hub stats always zero, image_max_count unenforced, no delete confirmation, deprecated current_time('timestamp').
steps: Fix XSS in duplicate-detection JS: replace innerHTML with createElement/textContent
Fix hub stats to query post_status instead of meta key
Enforce image_max_count: render multiple file inputs in form, validate in AJAX handler, pass to localized JS
Add onclick confirm to delete permanently row action
acceptance_criteria: No innerHTML with user data in duplicate-detection code
Hub stats use post_status field for in_progress/fulfilled counts
image_max_count enforced in form template, AJAX handler, and JS config
Delete Permanently row action has confirmation dialog
All PHP files pass syntax check
findings: All 6 review issues addressed. Issue 1 (XSS): replaced innerHTML with createElement/textContent in initDuplicateDetection. Issue 2 (hub stats): changed from count_posts_by_meta to count_posts with post_status array including zcrb_in_progress and zcrb_fulfilled. Issue 3 (image_max_count): renders N file inputs based on setting, added imageMaxCount to localized JS, AJAX handler processes zcrb_images[] array with count enforcement. Issue 4 (delete confirm): added onclick confirm() to Delete Permanently row action link. Issue 5 (upvote race): acknowledged as low priority, acceptable at WordPress scale. Issue 6 (deprecated): replaced both current_time('timestamp') calls with time(). Issue 7 (email): acceptable as-is, plain text with URL on own line is standard WP pattern.
